targets.queryText: SELECT as_of_date_local AS time, ROUND(MAX(CASE WHEN symbol = (SELECT symbol FROM daily_return_attribution WHERE window = '1m' AND symbol != '__INCOME__' AND as_of_date_local >= date('now','-90 day') GROUP BY symbol ORDER BY SUM(contribution_pct) DESC LIMIT 1) THEN contribution_pct END), 2) AS "#1", ROUND(MAX(CASE WHEN symbol = (SELECT symbol FROM daily_return_attribution WHERE window = '1m' AND symbol != '__INCOME__' AND as_of_date_local >= date('now','-90 day') GROUP BY symbol ORDER BY SUM(contribution_pct) DESC LIMIT 1 OFFSET 1) THEN contribution_pct END), 2) AS "#2", ROUND(MAX(CASE WHEN symbol = (SELECT symbol FROM daily_return_attribution WHERE window = '1m' AND symbol != '__INCOME__' AND as_of_date_local >= date('now','-90 day') GROUP BY symbol ORDER BY SUM(contribution_pct) DESC LIMIT 1 OFFSET 2) THEN contribution_pct END), 2) AS "#3", ROUND(MAX(CASE WHEN symbol = (SELECT symbol FROM daily_return_attribution WHERE window = '1m' AND symbol != '__INCOME__' AND as_of_date_local >= date('now','-90 day') GROUP BY symbol ORDER BY SUM(contribution_pct) DESC LIMIT 1 OFFSET 3) THEN contribution_pct END), 2) AS "#4", ROUND(MAX(CASE WHEN symbol = (SELECT symbol FROM daily_return_attribution WHERE window = '1m' AND symbol != '__INCOME__' AND as_of_date_local >= date('now','-90 day') GROUP BY symbol ORDER BY SUM(contribution_pct) DESC LIMIT 1 OFFSET 4) THEN contribution_pct END), 2) AS "#5" FROM daily_return_attribution WHERE window = '1m' AND as_of_date_local >= date('now','-90 day') GROUP BY as_of_date_local ORDER BY as_of_date_local;

SELECT symbol AS "Symbol", ROUND(SUM(contribution_pct), 2) AS "Total Contribution %", ROUND(AVG(weight_avg_pct), 2) AS "Avg Weight %", ROUND(AVG(return_pct), 2) AS "Avg Return %" FROM daily_return_attribution WHERE window = '1m' AND as_of_date_local >= date('now','-90 day') AND symbol != '__INCOME__' GROUP BY symbol ORDER BY ROUND(SUM(contribution_pct), 2) ASC LIMIT 10;
